name: Anthropic API Key
description: Creates an API key for the Anthropic Messages API (Claude).
prereqs: An Anthropic account with billing enabled (credit card on file or active plan)

steps.title: Open the API Keys page
steps.instruction: Click the button below to open the Anthropic Console directly on the API Keys page. Sign in if prompted.
steps.screenshot_hint: You should see a table with columns: Key, Workspace, Created by, Created at.

steps.title: Click '+ Create Key'
steps.instruction: Look for the '+ Create Key' button in the top-right corner of the page. Click it.
steps.screenshot_hint: It's a dark button in the top-right, next to the 'API keys' heading.

steps.title: Name your key
steps.instruction: A dialog will appear asking for a name. Type something you'll recognise later — for example 'rialu' or 'claude-code-daisy'. Then click 'Create Key'.
steps.screenshot_hint: Just a text field and a Create button. Keep the name short and descriptive.

steps.title: Copy the key NOW
steps.instruction: The key is displayed on screen. It starts with 'sk-ant-api03-' followed by a long string. Copy the entire thing and paste it below.
steps.input_label: Paste your Anthropic API key here
steps.warning: This is the only time the full key is shown. If you close this dialog without copying it, the key is gone and you'll need to create a new one.

steps.title: Verify it works (optional)
steps.instruction:
If you want to check the key works, open a terminal and run:

curl https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages -H 'x-api-key: YOUR_KEY' -H 'anthropic-version: 2023-06-01' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-20250514","max_tokens":10,"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"hi"}]}'

You should get a JSON response back.

vault_entry.notes: API key for Anthropic Messages API (Claude).
